## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss recruitment strategies, hiring processes, and operational improvements for fwd.digital.](https://fathom.video/share/Kuif71Z_czJ11sBzxxVHxNTyTipk9oxe?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Need to improve screening and scheduling processes for sales calls and recruitment](https://fathom.video/share/Kuif71Z_czJ11sBzxxVHxNTyTipk9oxe?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Considering hiring a dedicated sales/operations person to handle inbound leads and customer management](https://fathom.video/share/Kuif71Z_czJ11sBzxxVHxNTyTipk9oxe?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Planning to engage with Quantum Talent for hiring principal engineers](https://fathom.video/share/Kuif71Z_czJ11sBzxxVHxNTyTipk9oxe?tab=summary&timestamp=21.0)
  - [Implementing a referral bonus program: 10K for engineers, 3K for non-engineers](https://fathom.video/share/Kuif71Z_czJ11sBzxxVHxNTyTipk9oxe?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)

## Topics

### Recruitment Process Optimization

  - [Currently using LinkedIn for outreach, but facing limitations with mass messaging](https://fathom.video/share/Kuif71Z_czJ11sBzxxVHxNTyTipk9oxe?tab=summary&timestamp=32.0)
  - [Considering using Growth Machine tool for more efficient LinkedIn outreach](https://fathom.video/share/Kuif71Z_czJ11sBzxxVHxNTyTipk9oxe?tab=summary&timestamp=63.0)
  - [Discussing the need for a more streamlined process for handling responses and follow-ups](https://fathom.video/share/Kuif71Z_czJ11sBzxxVHxNTyTipk9oxe?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [Planning to block specific time slots on Marcel's calendar for recruiting calls](https://fathom.video/share/Kuif71Z_czJ11sBzxxVHxNTyTipk9oxe?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)

### Sales and Operations Improvements

  - [Current inbound lead conversion rate is around 25% for qualified leads](https://fathom.video/share/Kuif71Z_czJ11sBzxxVHxNTyTipk9oxe?tab=summary&timestamp=659.0)
  - [Need for better screening of inbound leads to avoid low-quality meetings](https://fathom.video/share/Kuif71Z_czJ11sBzxxVHxNTyTipk9oxe?tab=summary&timestamp=681.0)
  - [Considering hiring a dedicated sales/operations person to handle lead qualification and customer management](https://fathom.video/share/Kuif71Z_czJ11sBzxxVHxNTyTipk9oxe?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
  - [Discussing potential candidates like Jeff (high risk, high reward) and Gabriela (with agency experience)](https://fathom.video/share/Kuif71Z_czJ11sBzxxVHxNTyTipk9oxe?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)

### Financial Operations

  - [Need to improve invoicing and financial processes](https://fathom.video/share/Kuif71Z_czJ11sBzxxVHxNTyTipk9oxe?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)
  - [Planning to set up automation for deal closures and QuickBooks integration](https://fathom.video/share/Kuif71Z_czJ11sBzxxVHxNTyTipk9oxe?tab=summary&timestamp=777.0)
  - [Considering outsourcing or finding a better solution for invoice and receivables/payables management](https://fathom.video/share/Kuif71Z_czJ11sBzxxVHxNTyTipk9oxe?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)

### Hiring Strategy

  - [Focus on hiring for H1, with a roadmap of roles to fill before and after getting hiring help](https://fathom.video/share/Kuif71Z_czJ11sBzxxVHxNTyTipk9oxe?tab=summary&timestamp=1223.0)
  - [Identifying bottlenecks in the company, such as training for new hires](https://fathom.video/share/Kuif71Z_czJ11sBzxxVHxNTyTipk9oxe?tab=summary&timestamp=1254.0)
  - [Considering re-engaging with previous candidates who progressed far in the hiring process](https://fathom.video/share/Kuif71Z_czJ11sBzxxVHxNTyTipk9oxe?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
  - [Exploring hiring options in Mexico for cost-effectiveness and timezone compatibility](https://fathom.video/share/Kuif71Z_czJ11sBzxxVHxNTyTipk9oxe?tab=summary&timestamp=1651.0)

### Engagement with Quantum Talent

  - [Planning to use Quantum Talent for hiring principal engineers](https://fathom.video/share/Kuif71Z_czJ11sBzxxVHxNTyTipk9oxe?tab=summary&timestamp=21.0)
  - [Chris from Quantum Talent highly recommended for his network and efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/Kuif71Z_czJ11sBzxxVHxNTyTipk9oxe?tab=summary&timestamp=1835.0)

### Employee Referral Program

  - [Implementing a referral bonus program: 10K for engineers, 3K for non-engineers](https://fathom.video/share/Kuif71Z_czJ11sBzxxVHxNTyTipk9oxe?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)
  - [Bonuses to be paid out on the new hire's six-month anniversary](https://fathom.video/share/Kuif71Z_czJ11sBzxxVHxNTyTipk9oxe?tab=summary&timestamp=2002.0)
